mapper.sql: id::text AS id, title, subtitle, image_id::text AS "imageId", link_type AS "linkType", link_value AS "linkValue", active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM banner
active_yn = #{activeYn}
SELECT FROM banner WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banner (title, subtitle, image_id, link_type, link_value, active_yn, sort_order) VALUES (#{title}, #{subtitle}, ${imageId}, #{linkType}, #{linkValue}, #{activeYn}, #{sortOrder}) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE banner
title = #{title}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, image_id = ${imageId}, link_type = #{linkType}, link_value = #{linkValue}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder},
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
